$comment: scripts/RocketHideoutB4F.asm RocketHideoutB4FRocket3AfterBattleText — beaten, Rocket 3 lets slip that he dropped the LIFT KEY; only once the text is dismissed does the ball turn up beside him (CheckAndSetEvent EVENT_ROCKET_DROPPED_LIFT_KEY -> ShowObject ITEM_5 at (10,2); the _shown record persists it).

commands.text:
Oh no! I dropped
the LIFT KEY!
